questions.question: Which institution proposed new rules in 2026 to strengthen protection for customers against digital banking fraud?
questions.explanation: The Reserve Bank of India proposed updated guidelines to improve customer protection and faster complaint resolution in digital banking fraud cases.

questions.question: Which digital currency initiative was piloted for food subsidy distribution in Puducherry in February 2026?

questions.question: Which organization manages India's foreign exchange reserves?
questions.explanation: The Reserve Bank of India manages India's foreign exchange reserves and controls monetary policy.

questions.question: Which organization regulates India's securities and stock market?
questions.explanation: The Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) regulates stock exchanges and protects investors.

questions.question: Which scheme aims to improve financial inclusion through bank accounts in India?
questions.explanation: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY) was launched to expand banking access and financial inclusion.

questions.question: Which organization developed India's Unified Payments Interface (UPI)?
questions.explanation: UPI was developed by the National Payments Corporation of India to enable instant digital payments.

questions.question: Which international financial organization is headquartered in Washington D.C.?
questions.explanation: The International Monetary Fund (IMF) is headquartered in Washington D.C.

questions.question: Which banking scheme allocates a lead bank for each district to improve credit flow and banking services?
questions.explanation: Under the Lead Bank Scheme, one bank takes responsibility for banking development in a district. :contentReference[oaicite:2]{index=2}

questions.question: Which global group of countries includes India and focuses on major economic cooperation?
questions.explanation: The G20 is a group of major economies working on global economic stability.

questions.question: Which authority proposed stricter norms on bank lending to Real Estate Investment Trusts (REITs)?
questions.explanation: RBI proposed stricter lending rules for banks regarding REIT financing. :contentReference[oaicite:3]{index=3}

questions.question: Which corporation introduced a risk-based premium framework for deposit insurance in 2026?

questions.question: Which bank acts as the 'banker to banks' in India?
questions.explanation: The RBI serves as the banker to other banks and regulates the banking system.

questions.question: Which payment system allows instant money transfer using mobile devices in India?
questions.explanation: UPI allows real-time bank transfers using smartphones.

questions.question: Which ministry presents the Union Budget of India?
questions.explanation: The Union Budget is presented by the Finance Minister in Parliament.

questions.question: Which body supervises insurance companies in India?
questions.explanation: Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India regulates insurance companies.

questions.question: Which organization focuses on rural development banking in India?
questions.explanation: National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development supports agriculture and rural finance.

questions.question: Which initiative promotes digital payments growth in India?
questions.explanation: Digital India encourages digital infrastructure and online services including digital payments.

questions.question: Which organization monitors inflation and sets key interest rates in India?
questions.explanation: RBI controls interest rates through monetary policy decisions.
